name: Poached Sole with Shrlmp Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 Tbsp Finely chopped green onion (or shallots)
4 1/2 oz Can medium-sized shrimp, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly butter a shallow, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish.
2. Place frozen fish fillets in the baking dish and heat, covered, for 2 minutes in the Microwave Oven.
3. Separate fish fillets and arrange in the baking dish. Sprinkle with chopped green onion, salt, and pepper to taste. Pour wine over the fish.
4. Cover and heat in the Microwave Oven for 8 minutes or until the fish flakes easily with a fork. Baste the fish several times during heating.
5. Place cooked fish on a heat-resistant, non-metallic serving platter and set aside. Reserve the liquid.
6. Melt 4 tablespoons butter in a small, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl for 30 seconds in the Microwave Oven.
7. Blend in flour until smooth.
8. Gradually stir in cream until smooth.
9. Return sauce to the Microwave Oven and heat, uncovered, for 3 to 4 minutes or until thickened and smooth. Stir occasionally. Set aside.
10. Heat reserved fish liquid uncovered for 4 to 6 minutes or until reduced to 1/2 cup.
11. Stir fish liquid and shrimp into the reserved sauce until well blended.
12. Spoon shrimp sauce over fish. Cover and heat in the Microwave Oven for 1 to 2 minutes or until heated through.
13. Garnish with chopped parsley.
